name: Icebox Pumpkin Cream Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Line a 10 1/2-by 15 1/2-inch jelly-roll pan with parchment or wax paper and grease the paper well.
3. To prepare the pumpkin roll, beat egg yolks and granulated sugar until light and thick. Blend in 1/2 cup pumpkin puree, 1 teaspoon pumpkin spice, flour, and baking powder.
4. Beat egg whites with salt until firm peaks form. Fold whites into yolk mixture.
5. Pour batter into the prepared pan and bake for 15 minutes or until the cake bounces back when touched in the center.
6. Turn out onto wax paper sprinkled with powdered sugar. Immediately peel off top paper and carefully roll up the cake, making the roll lengthwise.
7. Cool the cooled cake.
8. Meanwhile, whip the cream until stiff, beating in 1/4 cup powdered sugar. Blend in 1/2 cup cooked pureed pumpkin, 1/2 teaspoon pumpkin spice, pecans, and vanilla.
9. Unroll the cooled cake and spread with the filling. Roll it up again.
10. Chill for 2 to 4 hours before serving. Sprinkle with additional powdered sugar when ready to serve.
